## Detector Name

A short name for this detector (e.g., "crypto-mining").

## What It Should Detect

Describe the security threat this detector would catch.

## Examples

```typescript
// Code that should be flagged
```

### Safe Example
```typescript
// Code that should NOT be flagged
```

## Severity

What severity level should findings have? (critical / high / medium / low)

## References

Links to relevant security advisories, blog posts, or CVEs.
